assessment.note: He names confidence in senior forums as the stretch point and signals avoidance of visible senior-level exposure, indicating a strong growth gap and mild pullback in engagement.

new_queue.label: Senior forums
new_queue.name: Senior forums — what would help you show up there with more confidence?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific confidence gap he named in visible senior settings.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Role definition
new_queue.name: What does the next-level Head of Product role mean to you?
new_queue.description: Gets his own definition of strategic ownership and success before discussing gaps.

new_queue.label: Delegate more
new_queue.name: What are you still holding that someone else could own?
new_queue.description: Tests where he is still acting as an individual executor instead of leveraging the team.

new_queue.label: Next experiment
new_queue.name: What's one concrete shift you want to try before our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment that turns the growth plan into action.
